title: Smart Model Router Configuration
description: Configuration for smart-model-router. Supports any number of custom tiers beyond haiku/sonnet/opus.

action.description: warn: show recommendation only. autoswitch: change settings.json automatically.

default_model.description: Model to assume when settings.json has no 'model' field set.

tiers.description: List of model tiers. Add as many as you need.

models.description: Substrings to match against current model in settings.json.

switch_to.description: Value written to settings.json when autoswitching.

priority.description: Tier weight. Lower = lighter model. Must be unique.

keywords.description: Plain-text keywords matched case-insensitively against prompt.

patterns.description: Regex patterns matched against prompt (Python re syntax).

max_word_count.description: Only match if prompt has fewer words than this.

min_word_count.description: Only match if prompt has at least this many words.

force_min_word_count.description: Force this tier if prompt exceeds this word count (no keywords needed).

force_question_word_count.description: Force this tier if prompt contains '?' and exceeds this word count.
